title: progress.json
description: Run state tracking. Single writer: the orchestrator (legacy) or the runner (runner path).

phases_completed.description: Ordered list of completed phase keys

current_phase.description: Phase key currently executing, or null when idle/complete

status.description: `awaiting_user_instruction` is set when a critical phase FAIL cannot be resolved automatically (RCA stop_with_blocker, budget exhausted with no fallback, systemic-RCA accept_finding). The runner pauses and emits monitor/user_decision_request.json instead of auto-skipping to a partial report.

retry_counts.description: Map of phase key to retry count

resolved_phases.description: Resolved phase list after applying SKIP_INTEGRATION and conditional_deps

human_interventions.description: V2 only: log of human escalation interactions

human_extensions.description: V2 only: map of phase key to human extension count

budget_mode.description: Decomposes the legacy budget_override.unlimited into two scoped modes. `default` follows the registry's rerun policy: positive rerun.max_per_phase / max_total values are enforced, while non-positive values mean uncapped retries. `diagnostic` is orchestrator-set when the systemic RCA returns terminal_action_systemic=accept_finding: e2e benchmarks are halted, only instrumentation runs are allowed, and the loop converges to report-generate. `extended` is user-authorized only and lifts the per-phase / total caps for additional e2e attempts when a custom registry uses finite caps.

rationale.description: Free-text reason this mode was selected (e.g. systemic RCA accept_finding, user lifted cap)

scope.description: Defaults to session. extended modes may scope to a single phase if the user requests it.

response_sequence.description: V2 only: sequence of response actions taken

rca_fingerprints.description: Per-phase latest RCA fingerprint. Populated by the runner so the outer dispatcher can render repeated-failure context without re-reading the full rca_history.json.

systemic_rca_triggered.description: Per-phase flag indicating that systemic RCA fired at least once. Helps tests and dashboards distinguish per-phase retries from systemic-level decisions.

awaiting_user_instruction_phase.description: Phase key whose FAIL caused the run to enter `awaiting_user_instruction`. The accompanying request artifact is monitor/user_decision_request.json.

terminal_state.description: Populated when the runner pauses for explicit user instruction or finishes. Records the blocker phase, retry-exhaustion flag, and rca_fingerprint without forcing the dispatcher to read large RCA artifacts.
